zh.lifeSummary: 當Adelize en Beauvais de Clermont於大約1065年出生在法國皮卡迪奧易可勒爾蒙特時，她的父親Hugh de Clermont36歲，母親Marguerite Roucy21歲。她於1085年與Gilbert FitzRichard de Clare 1st Earl of Hertford在英國賀特福爾賀特福德結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1124年在英國素福爾可克萊爾享年61歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Adelize en Beauvais de Clermont于大约1065年出生在法国皮卡迪奧易可勒爾蒙特时，她的父亲Hugh de Clermont36岁，母亲Marguerite Roucy21岁。她于1085年与Gilbert FitzRichard de Clare 1st Earl of Hertford在英国賀特福爾賀特福德结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于大约1124年在英国素福爾可克萊爾享年61岁。

nameMeanings.name: en
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 岑, referring to ‘small high hills’ or ‘precipice’ in Chinese: (i) from the placename Cen (岑), the name of a fief (located in Hancheng in present-day Shaanxi province), which was granted to Qu, nephew of King Wen of Zhou (1152–1056 BC ), by King Wu of Zhou (c. 1087–1043 BC ). (ii) for some families, this surname can be traced back to certain minority ethnic groups in ancient southern China.

nameMeanings.name: Beauvais
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Armand, Chantelle, Clelie, Denys, Edouard, Germain, Guilene, Laurette, Ludger, Marcel, Michel, Olivier.
French: habitational name from (Le) Beauvais, the name of several places in various parts of France.
History: Jacques Beauvais dit Saint-Gemme from the Perche region of France is recorded in Montreal, QC, in 1654.

nameMeanings.name: Adelize
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: diminutive of Adèle ( see Adele ), used occasionally in England from the early 16th century onwards, and now also found in the wider English-speaking world.

historicEvents.title: Battle of Hastings
historicEvents.description: Battle of Hastings was fought between the Norman-French army and the battle-wary English army on October 14, 1066. Duke William of Normandy believed he was the rightful king rather than Harold, who had been crowned king several months earlier. Harold was killed in battle and William was crowned king on Christmas Day 1066.

historicEvents.title: Domesday Book
historicEvents.description: Domesday Book is Britain's earliest extant public record with information containing land surveys and landholdings commissioned by William I. The book was completed in 1086.

historicEvents.title: The Crusades
historicEvents.description: A series of religious wars between Christians and Muslims, known as the Crusades, occurred between 1096 and 1291, and played a large role in European Christian dominance in the Middle East.

historicEvents.title: The Battle of Tichebray
historicEvents.description: King Henry I defeated and captured his brother, Robert of Normandy, at the Battle of Tinchebray in 1106. Robert remained in captivity until his death in 1134.

en.lifeSummary: When Adelize en Beauvais de Clermont was born about 1065, in Clermont, Oise, Picardie, France, her father, Hugh de Clermont, was 36 and her mother, Marguerite Roucy, was 21. She married Gilbert FitzRichard de Clare 1st Earl of Hertford in 1085, in Hertford, Hertfordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 5 daughters. She died about 1124, in Clare, Suffolk, England, at the age of 61.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Adelize en Beauvais de Clermont est née environ 1065, à Clermont, Oise, Picardie, France, son père, Hugh de Clermont, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Marguerite Roucy, avait 21 ans. Elle a épousé Gilbert FitzRichard de Clare 1st Earl of Hertford en 1085, à Hertford, Hertfordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée environ 1124, à Clare, Suffolk, Angleterre, à l’âge de 61 ans.

de.Tonbridge Castle, Tonbridge, Kent, Engla: Tonbridge Castle, Tonbridge, Kent, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Adelize en Beauvais de Clermont um 1065 in Clermont, Oise, Picardie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Hugh de Clermont 36 und ihre Mutter Marguerite Roucy 21. Sie hat 1085 in Hertford, Hertfordshire, England Gilbert FitzRichard de Clare 1st Earl of Hertford geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb um 1124 im Alter von 61 Jahren in Clare, Suffolk, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Adelize en Beauvais de Clermont è nata il circa 1065 nel Clermont, Oise, Picardie, Francia, sua padre, Hugh de Clermont, aveva 36 anni e sua madre, Marguerite Roucy, aveva 21 anni. Lei sposato Gilbert FitzRichard de Clare 1st Earl of Hertford nel 1085, nel Hertford, Hertfordshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 5 figlie. Morì circa 1124, nel Clare, Suffolk, England, all'età di 61 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Adelize en Beauvais de Clermontが約1065年にフランスピカーディオイゼクラーモントで生まれた時，父Hugh de Clermontは36歳，母Marguerite Roucyは21歳であった。1085年にイギリスハートフォードシュアイアハートフォードでGilbert FitzRichard de Clare 1st Earl of Hertfordと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は約1124年にイギリススフォルククラーで61歳で死去した。

ko.Tonbridge Castle, Tonbridge, Kent, Engla: 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 토브리지 토브리지 카스틀
ko.lifeSummary: Adelize en Beauvais de Clermont(이)가 대략 1065년 프랑스 피카디 이스 클레몽에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Hugh de Clermont(은)는 36세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Marguerite Roucy(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 1085년 영국 허트퍼드실르 허트퍼드에서 Gilbert FitzRichard de Clare 1st Earl of Hertford(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1124년 영국 수폴크 클래르에서 61세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ela casou-se com Gilbert FitzRichard de Clare 1st Earl of Hertford em 1085, em Hertford, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 5 filhas. ru.Tonbridge Castle, Tonbridge, Kent, Engla: тонбридж кастл, тонбридж, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Adelize en Beauvais de Clermont родилась около 1065 г. в местности клирмонт, оис, пикарди, Франция, её отцу по имени Hugh de Clermont было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Marguerite Roucy, 21. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Gilbert FitzRichard de Clare 1st Earl of Hertford в 1085 г. в местности хиртфорд, хиртфордшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 5 дочерей. Она умерла около 1124 г. в местности клар, суффолк, Англия в возрасте 61 год.
